import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './inventory.css'; const Inventory = () => { const [items, setItems] = useState([ { id: "INV-001", name: "Paracetamol", category: "Medicine", stock: 120, unit: "Boxes", price: "$10", status: "In Stock" }, { id: "INV-002", name: "Surgical Masks", category: "PPE", stock: 15, unit: "Packs", price: "$25", status: "Low Stock" }, { id: "INV-003", name: "Oxygen Cylinders", category: "Equipment", stock: 8, unit: "Units", price: "$150", status: "Low Stock" }, { id: "INV-004", name: "Latex Gloves", category: "PPE", stock: 0, unit: "Boxes", price: "$12", status: "Out of Stock" }, ]); return (

); }; export default Inventory;
